summary: Full-Stack Software Engineer with a Master's in Computer Applications and three years of internship and project experience building AI-powered, cloud-native applications. Proficient in Python, React, TypeScript, Node.js, and Django. Experienced with RESTful APIs, NoSQL databases, CI/CD pipelines, Agile workflows, and scalable microservices architecture on AWS and Google Cloud.

bullets: Built and deployed 8 microservices using Node.js and Express.js on AWS EC2, reducing average API latency by 35% through connection pooling and Redis caching.
Contributed to React.js and TypeScript frontend, integrating 12 RESTful API endpoints and following Agile/SCRUM sprints tracked in Jira.
Worked with MongoDB and Elasticsearch for data storage and full-text search; reduced query time by 40% through proper index design.
Supported CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions; automated deployment for three staging environments reducing release time by half.
Designed and implemented Python-based data ingestion pipeline handling 50K records per day using Django ORM and Celery task queues.
Built a notification microservice using WebSockets and Redis pub/sub pattern, serving 10K+ concurrent users.
Wrote unit and integration tests using pytest, achieving 87% test coverage across the core service layer.
Collaborated with a cross-functional team of 8 engineers in daily standups and weekly sprint reviews following Agile methodology.
Delivered 5 client web applications using React, Node.js, and MongoDB; all projects received 5-star ratings.
Implemented payment integrations with Razorpay and Stripe for two e-commerce clients, handling INR 2L+ in transactions.
Built an automated invoice generation system with PDF export using ReportLab, reducing manual effort by 6 hours/week.
Built responsive UI components using HTML5, CSS3, and vanilla JavaScript for a logistics SaaS product.
Optimized MySQL queries for the order management module, cutting average query execution time from 800ms to 120ms.
Mentored two junior interns on Git workflow and REST API fundamentals.

projects.name: ResumeAI
projects.tech: React, FastAPI, Python, Playwright, AI, RAG
bullets: Developed an AI-powered ATS Resume Builder with a multi-agent optimization loop, RAG-based keyword retrieval, and job description analysis for targeted resume tailoring.
Engineered a Playwright-based PDF export pipeline with adaptive typography that auto-adjusts font size and spacing; integrated FastAPI backend with SSE for real-time agent progress.
Implemented JWT authentication, usage tracking, and a learning store that records successful resume patterns for future improvement.

projects.name: NotesApp
projects.tech: React.js, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, JWT, AWS
bullets: Built a full-stack CRUD notes application with React frontend and Node.js/Express.js backend; deployed on AWS EC2 with Nginx reverse proxy.
Implemented JWT authentication with refresh token rotation; served 2K+ users with 99.5% uptime over six months.
Designed MongoDB schema with indexing for fast full-text note search across large collections.

projects.name: CV Generator
projects.tech: Python, Django, SQLite, ReportLab, Google Cloud
bullets: Built a Django web application with PDF generation via ReportLab; implemented form validation, SQLite persistence, and Google Cloud file storage.
Deployed to Google Cloud App Engine with environment-variable configuration and automated daily DB backups to Cloud Storage.

projects.name: Inventory Management System
bullets: Built a Flask-based inventory management API with PostgreSQL backend; containerized using Docker Compose for local development parity.
Added Redis caching for frequently accessed product lookup endpoints, reducing average response time by 60%.
Implemented role-based access control with three permission levels and audit logging for all state-changing operations.

projects.name: Weather Dashboard
bullets: Built a real-time weather dashboard consuming OpenWeather API with automatic location detection and 5-day forecast visualization.
Implemented server-side API key proxying with Node.js to prevent client-side exposure of credentials.

education.institution: Tulsiramji Gaikwad Patil College of Engineering and Technology

certifications.name: Docker and Kubernetes: The Complete Guide
